Chainlink VRF Production Integration This contract implements REAL Chainlink VRF v2.5 calls for production deployment. Key differences from VRFConsumer.sol (simulation): - Inherits VRFConsumerBaseV2Plus for production-ready VRF integration - Makes actual VRF requests to Chainlink Coordinator - Secured callback via rawFulfillRandomWords from Coordinator Network Configuration: - Ethereum Mainnet VRF Coordinator: 0x271682DEB8C4E0901D1a1550aD2e64D568E69909 - Ethereum Sepolia VRF Coordinator: 0x8103B0A8A00be2DDC778e6e7eaa21791Cd364625 - Arbitrum Mainnet: 0x41034678D6C633D8a95c75e1138A360a28bA15d1 - Arbitrum Sepolia: 0x50d47e4142598E3411aA864e08a44284e471AC6f Key Hashes (Gas Lanes): - Ethereum Mainnet 200 gwei: 0x8af398995b04c28e9951adb9721ef74c74f93e6a478f39e7e0777be13527e7ef - Ethereum Sepolia 150 gwei: 0x474e34a077df58807dbe9c96d3c009b23b3c6d0cce433e59bbf5b34f823bc56c - Arbitrum Mainnet 50 gwei: 0x72d2b016bb5b62912afea355ebf33b91319f828738b111b723b78696b9847b63 - Arbitrum Sepolia: 0x027f94ff1465b3525f9fc03e9ff7d6d2c0953482246dd6ae07570c45d6631414 Sequence #2 Compliance: - VRF seed\u53d6\u5f97 \u2705 Real Chainlink VRF v2.5 call - Prover\u9078\u51fa\uff082/5\uff09 \u2705 via weighted stake selection - 5\u5206\u30bf\u30a4\u30e0\u30a2\u30a6\u30c8 \u2705 VRF_TIMEOUT = 5 minutes - Fallback \u2705 uses block.prevrandao Security Features: - Only VRF Coordinator can call fulfillRandomWords - Only L1Vault can request prover selection - 2-step ownership transfer returns.isTimedOut: True if VRF has timed out

returns.prover: The selected prover address (address(0) if not yet selected)
returns.randomValue: The random value used (0 if not yet received)

returns.ready: True if prover has been selected

requestProverSelection(bytes32).details: Makes REAL Chainlink VRF v2.5 request

params.unlockRequestId: The unlock request ID that needs prover selection

params._useNativePayment: Whether to use native token for payment

setVRFCoordinator(address).details: Use with caution - only for coordinator upgrades

triggerFallback(bytes32).details: Fallback mechanism using block.prevrandao when VRF times out
